title: Asian fountains
description: Adds an asian fountain structure to the game, with a hidden small loot room
body:
This mod adds an Asian Fountain structure to the game, featuring a hidden loot room.

- Spawns: The fountain can be found in Forest and mainly Cherry Grove biomes.
- Hidden Room: Inside the fountain, there's a small hidden room containing loot to discover

![fountain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19261026346089b0908a6cd79579712741421978.jpeg)
Feel free to put it in your modpack!
